'''Kalkovak''' was a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] populated by various [[Species/Legends|species]] including a [[Quarren Sector|large sector]] populated by [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]]. It was a port world for travelers going to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Illyan Webble]] was left on the planet after he irritated the crew he was traveling with. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] once frequented the world in search of Webble and his information on the whereabouts of the [[Yavin Vassilika]].

{{Planet-stub}}
